# ThreadSanitizer suppressions for AstronomyKit's Linux CI job.
#
# Swift's `Synchronization.Mutex` is not instrumented by ThreadSanitizer on
# Linux: TSan does not observe the lock's happens-before edges, so memory that
# is correctly serialized by a Mutex is still reported as a data race whenever
# two threads contend for it. The entries below are such false positives — the
# guarded state is only ever touched while holding the corresponding Swift-side
# Mutex. (macOS TSan models the same Mutex correctly and reports no races.)
#
# FixedStar shares the Astronomy Engine's single user-definable star slot
# (BODY_STAR1). `FixedStar.calculationLock` serializes each Astronomy_DefineStar
# write together with the calculation that reads the slot, so concurrent
# FixedStar calculations are safe. See Sources/AstronomyKit/FixedStar.swift.
race:Astronomy_DefineStar
